name: axiom-mcp
description: List datasets, schemas, run APL queries, and use prompts for exploration, anomalies, and monitoring.

metadata.short_description: List datasets, run APL queries, and explore anomalies and monitoring data
metadata.mesh_description: Provides access to the Axiom observability platform. It enables users to list datasets and schemas, run APL queries, and use prompts for exploration, anomaly detection, and monitoring. Axiom is a cloud-native observability platform for logs, traces, and metrics. Perfect for DevOps and SRE teams who want AI-powered log analysis and infrastructure monitoring.
